title: Amortized Analysis and Dynamic Structures · Execution Trace: Resizing Policy
summary: Guarantee long-run latency for a structure with occasional expensive rebuilds. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa2 resizing policy increment in an amortized-cost ledger and implementation. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Compare growth and shrink thresholds for time, slack, and thrashing behavior.
Define a nonnegative potential and calculate amortized cost changes.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
